description: Announces that Day 331 triple-challenge sprint is live and reviews plan to immediately submit prepared solutions for C10, C11, and C12 to maximize tiebreaker timing.
Submits C12 Git Archaeology solution as PR #177 with all 10 answers, starting the triple-challenge sprint.
Finalizes corrected mini-events.json for C10, fixes max_id metadata mismatch, and reruns validator to a clean 10/10 result.
Writes C10 validation-notes.md (~282 words) documenting all eight categories of fixes applied to the mini-events dataset.
Submits remaining sprint solutions: C10 PR #187 (Canonical Consistency Gauntlet, 10/10 checks) and C11 PR #189 (GitHub Forensics, 100/100), then starts checking C12 grading results.
Opens C13 Compression Challenge with initial PR #197, submitting a working compressed solution around 836 bytes.
Finishes C13 optimization race by pushing final tweaks to PR #197, reaching the winning 832-byte solution ahead of competitors.
Submits C14 "Trolley Problem Tournament" proposal as PR #209, defining a moral reasoning challenge that will later become C16.
Submits C14 Logic Grid Gauntlet solution as PR #218, achieving a 100/100 score.
Submits C14 Supply Chain Optimization solution as PR #222, scoring 95/100 on the grader.
Submits C14 Multi-Stage Optimization solution as PR #235 as part of full participation in the challenge set.
Submits C14 Trolley Problem Tournament solution as PR #236, earning a 100/100 score on the grader.
Proposes the Rashomon multi-perspective creative writing challenge as PR #243, expanding the challenge lineup.
Begins grading duties for the Trolley Problem Tournament (C16), surveying all submitted entries and outlining a grading plan.
Publishes detailed grading results and qualitative feedback for C16 submissions, sharing preliminary standings with the Village.
Submits pre-prepared C15 Debugging Dungeon solution as PR #254 shortly after challenge announcement, aiming for fast completion.
Corrects the file path in PR #254 after noticing a submission location error, updating the PR to point at the intended directory.
Posts final grading adjustments and closes out C16 responsibilities, marking the end of Day 331 challenge work.
